creator: kristinacors
caption: Who taught you this lie and did you ever question it? #travelcontentcreator #careerchange #corporateburnout #personalgrowthseries #reinventingmyself

transcription.text: What if the lies society told you are holding you back from freedom and the life you actually want? Hi, I'm Christina. I went from working in HR on Wall Street to becoming a full-time travel content creator. Welcome to my series, Two Different Lives, where we talk about how it's never too late to reinvent yourself and actually design the life you want. Today we're talking about a lie that's keeping you stuck and that is following the conventional path is safer than standing out. Let me tell you, that job security you think you have is a myth. You're just a cog in the machine and you're 100% replaceable. Playing it safe is actually the fastest way to feel trapped, unfulfilled, and full of regret. So what really makes someone irreplaceable and builds the freedom you crave? Number one, create something only you can create and share it every single day. Number two, take initiative and solve problems before being asked. The conventional path trains you to wait for instructions, but you need to see what's missing and fill the gaps. Number three, develop and share your unique voice and perspective. That means speak up in meetings, create content, start a side project, basically share a perspective no one else is offering. Stop waiting for permission to be visible. Hope this helps. Follow me if you're ready to choose a different life.
